mapper.select: SELECT r.*, b.name as building_name FROM room r LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id ORDER BY r.building_id, r.room_number
SELECT r.*, b.name as building_name FROM room r LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id ORDER BY r.building_id, r.room_number LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT r.*, b.name as building_name FROM room r LEFT JOIN building b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM room WHERE building_id = #{buildingId} ORDER BY room_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (building_id, room_number, floor, capacity, current_occupancy, gender, status) VALUES (#{buildingId}, #{roomNumber}, #{floor}, #{capacity}, #{currentOccupancy}, #{gender}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET current_occupancy = #{count} WHERE id = #{roomId}
UPDATE room SET current_occupancy = current_occupancy + 1 WHERE id = #{roomId}
UPDATE room SET current_occupancy = current_occupancy - 1 WHERE id = #{roomId} AND current_occupancy > 0
